{{Missing Info|specifics=Mirage 6s Name}}
{{CargoRelic
|name=Cairo Declaration
|rank=SS
|affct=FAME
|birthday=07-01
|source=Fragment Crafting (4.6%), Grandmaster Scrolls (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.18%), Wishing (0.17%)
|description=On Jul 1, 1943, the leaders of allied countries signed this treaty and prepared for the meeting.

Leaders of the Allies gathered in Cairo to discuss the reconstruction of the international order after the victory of World War II. Japan would return all occupied territories after the war and grant Korea's freedom and independence. "Declaration Contents:" the Allies' intentions to continue deploying military force until Japan's unconditional surrender; Japan be stripped of all the islands in the Pacific which she has seized or occupied; all the territories Japan has stolen from the Chinese shall be restored to the Republic of China in due course; Korea shall become free and independent.
|fame=103
|art=66
|fth=55
|civ=69
|tech=54
|ss1=Quarry Output +4%<br>Quarry Max Cap +4%<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +4%
|ss2=Quarry Output +6%<br>Quarry Max Cap +6%<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +6%
|ss3=Quarry Output +8%<br>Quarry Max Cap +8%<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +8%
|ss4=Quarry Output +12%<br>Quarry Max Cap +12%<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +12%
|ss5=Quarry Output +16%<br>Quarry Max Cap +16%<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +16%
|ss6=Quarry Output +22%<br>Quarry Max Cap +22%<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +22%
|ss7=Quarry Output +22%<br>Quarry Max Cap +22%<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +22%<br>Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +20% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Kemet skill III.png|50px]]Place in Kemetic Museum: This Relic's FAME +15
|skill2=[[File:Kemet skill III.png|50px]]Place in Kemetic Museum: In Kemet, 2x Blue Card Drops +15%
|skill3=[[File:Tadpolepond skill III.png|50px]]Place in Tadpole Pond: Max Cap +30%
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:Quarry Output Boost]]
[[Category:Ancient Fossil Boost]]
[[Category:Kemet Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Kemet Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:FAME Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Card Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Skill]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Output Boost]]
[[Category:Lottery Machine Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Divine Dragon Descents Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Lottery Draws]]
